senses.gloss: elative degree of ذَكِيّ (ḏakiyy):; smarter, more intelligent; smartest, most intelligent
elative degree of ذَكِيّ (ḏakiyy):; more fragrant; most fragrant
elative degree of ذَكِيّ (ḏakiyy):; tastier; tastiest

etymology.text: Elative of ذَكِيّ (ḏakiyy, “smart, intelligent; fragrant; tasty”), from the roots ذ ك و (ḏ k w) and ذ ك ي (ḏ k y).
